business.name: Elite Mobile JA
business.tagline: Instant replies for prices, availability, delivery, and trade-ins.
business.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM
business.about: Phones, accessories, trade-ins, and fast customer support.

presets.greeting: Hey! Welcome to Elite Mobile JA. Ask about phone prices, stock, delivery, trade-ins, accessories, or human support.
presets.hours: We're open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
presets.location: We're located in Mandeville, Manchester, Jamaica.
presets.delivery: Yes, we offer local delivery and pickup. Send your location and the phone or accessory you want.
presets.prices: Prices vary by model, storage, condition, and color. Tell me the exact phone you want and I'll guide you.
presets.tradein: Yes, we accept trade-ins on selected devices. Send your current phone model, storage, and condition.
presets.accessories: Yes, we carry cases, chargers, screen protectors, AirPods-style earbuds, and more.
presets.human: No problem — leave your name, phone number, and what you're interested in, and a team member can follow up.
presets.fallback: I can help with stock, prices, delivery, trade-ins, accessories, store hours, or getting a human to follow up.

inventory_keywords.iphone 13 pro: We often stock iPhone 13 Pro in different storage sizes. Tell me if you want 128GB, 256GB, or 512GB, and whether you want new or used.
inventory_keywords.iphone 14 pro: We can check iPhone 14 Pro stock for you. Tell me the storage and preferred color.
inventory_keywords.iphone: We carry iPhones in different models and conditions. Tell me the exact model and storage you want.
inventory_keywords.samsung: We carry selected Samsung devices. Tell me the exact model you're looking for.
inventory_keywords.airpods: Yes, we carry earbuds and accessories. Tell me whether you want original or budget-friendly options.
inventory_keywords.charger: Yes, we stock chargers and charging cables for different devices.
inventory_keywords.case: Yes, we have cases for many models. Tell me your phone model and preferred style.
